stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Flight Planning Manual MRJT 1 Figure 4.5.4.
Planning an IFR flight from Paris to London for the twin jet aeroplane.
Given:

Estimated Landing Mass: 49 700 kg
FL 280
W/V: 280°/40 kt
Average True Course: 320°
Procedure for descent 0.74 M/250 KIAS

Determine the time from the top of descent to London (elevation 80 ft).
